title: Max Chunks To Make Sorted II
titleCn: 最多能完成排序的块 II

testcases.input: arr = [5,4,3,2,1] Output: 1 Explanation: Splitting into two or more chunks will not return the required result. For example, splitting into [5, 4], [3, 2, 1] will result in [4, 5, 1, 2, 3], which isn't sorted.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Splitting into two or more chunks will not return the required result. For example, splitting into [5, 4], [3, 2, 1] will result in [4, 5, 1, 2, 3], which isn't sorted.

testcases.input: arr = [2,1,3,4,4] Output: 4 Explanation: We can split into two chunks, such as [2, 1], [3, 4, 4]. However, splitting into [2, 1], [3], [4], [4] is the highest number of chunks possible.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: We can split into two chunks, such as [2, 1], [3, 4, 4]. However, splitting into [2, 1], [3], [4], [4] is the highest number of chunks possible.
